since_last: 37% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.49%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 37% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC +2.50% · Gold +0.04% · Nasdaq100 +2.48%. 37% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.49%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.49%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.13%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +5.32%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +5.32%, MU +4.77%, VRT +3.86%, LSCC +3.43%, TSM +3.38%. Laggards: SPCX -4.22%, SAP -2.97%, APP -2.24%, GOOGL -2.14%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.22% at $177.2
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.22% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
